info.label: Software Developer
info.brief: Pragmatic software developer with 3+ years industry experience specializing in web applications, middleware, sdk development and concurrent software. Native of Porto, Portugal, I enjoy karaté, computer games, cycling, traveling and a eternal tinkerer at heart.
info.quote: Two steps back, one step forward.

employment.summary: 3+ years industry IT and software development experience.

history.summary: Backend developer for Core Onboarding product. A serverless, multi tenant platform, that performs KYC/KYB.
highlights: Developed integration framework, with a declarative approach. Allowing writing tests to a target multiple environments and validated features based on configuration.
Introduced the concept of personal development environments to the Onboarding product, allowing multiple developers to work concurrently.

Developed dynamic configuration module, allowing inferring values based on a template and tenant configuration files. Removed human errors and made runtime, deployment and tests configuration composable and seamless.
Automated CI/CD pipelines with concurrent tenant deployment, testing and reporting, proving efficiency and reducing errors.
Migrated Serverless framework to CDK, resulting in a seamless tech stack across teams, maintainable IoC, easy deployment and allowing new features to be developed.

history.summary: Backend developer for Ostate project, a parametric tool to generate architectural buildings.
highlights: Re-engineered and re-architected Ostate project to implement multiple non deterministic algorithms.
Clearly and concisely communicated with many different people of different backgrounds, like Architects and Physicists.
Automated CI/CD pipelines with Playwright for E2E frontend testing, improving reliability and reducing manual testing time.
Automated Ostate compiling project with nuke.build.
Implemented C++ 3D Geometrical code and wrapped into Python for safe usage by non tech people.

history.summary: Developer on Web team, researching and developing Uniface solutions to modern standards.
highlights: Development of Uniface Web SDK in HTML, Javascript and ProcScript.
Integrated new logic in end-to-end fashion. From a low code platform, HTML, Database, to C++ on Backend.

history.summary: Developer on main CMF Product, MES
highlights: Successfully migrated the main CMF Product from Silverlight to next gen implementation in Angular and .NET Core.
Worked in a product driven company in Agile faction, in multiple domain teams.
Re-engineered a module for highly regulated fields, precision weighting tools or medical fields, achieving certification and being used in production.
Developed an SDK in .NET to interact with Worldline Terminals
Worked on SDK in a multi threaded, async event oriented architecture.
Implemented multiple network protocols with different paradigms, sync, async, like TCP, UDP, RS232, HTTP.
Implemented layers of resilience and fault tolerance on top of networking protocols.
